A

addObserver(User) - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Placeholder method for adding an observer to the composite.
addProduct(Product) - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Adds an individual product to the composite.
applyDiscount(double) - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Applies a discount to all products in the composite.

D

displayCompositeDetails() - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Displays the details of the composite product, including its components and total price.
displayInfo() - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Displays the product information for the composite, including its name, category, and price.

G

getDiscountedPrice() - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Retrieves the total discounted price of the composite.
getProductCategory() - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Returns the category of the composite product.
getProducts() - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Retrieves all products that are part of the composite.

N

notifyObservers(String) - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Placeholder method for notifying observers about a change in the composite's state.

P

ProductComposite - Class in structuralCompositePattern
The ProductComposite class represents a composite product made up of multiple individual products.
ProductComposite(String) - Constructor for class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Creates a composite product with a specified name but no price.

R

removeProduct(Product) - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Removes an individual product from the composite.

S

setFixedPrice(double) - Method in class structuralCompositePattern.ProductComposite
Sets a fixed price for the composite.
structuralCompositePattern - package structuralCompositePattern
The structuralCompositePattern package contains classes and interfaces that implement the Composite design pattern.
